h1: Worcester Bosch Boiler Repair in London and Sussex
intro: We provide Worcester Bosch boiler repair across London and Sussex for pressure faults, lockouts, leaks, hot water issues and the kinds of repeat breakdowns that need proper diagnosis.
pricingGuidance: Worcester Bosch repair pricing depends on the model, the confirmed fault and whether any replacement parts are needed.
localProof: Booked across London and Sussex for Worcester Bosch faults where customers want diagnosis first and straight answers on repair versus replacement.
commonFaults: Poor heating or hot water performance

sections.heading: Common Worcester Bosch faults
sections.body: Typical issues include pressure loss, ignition trouble, poor hot water performance and faults that cause intermittent lockouts.

sections.heading: Why model-specific diagnosis matters
sections.body: The same symptom can mean different things across different Worcester Bosch models, so proper diagnosis matters before parts are changed.

sections.heading: Repair or replace?
sections.body: That decision depends on the age of the boiler, the parts involved and whether the appliance has become a repeat source of disruption.
